RuntimeError: Engine core initialization failed. See root cause above. Failed core proc(s): {'EngineCore': 1}
root_cause_summary: vLLM 0.20.0+cu129 wheel pulls torch 2.11.0+cu130 as transitive dep. Pod NVIDIA driver 550.127.08 (CUDA 12.4 max) cannot load CUDA 13.0 runtime libs. torch.cuda.is_available() returns False with warning 'NVIDIA driver on your system is too old (found version 12040)'. vLLM EngineCore subprocess then crashes at torch.accelerator.set_device_index() → torch._C._accelerator_setDeviceIndex() → torch/cuda/__init__.py:466 _lazy_init with terminal frame 'RuntimeError: Cannot re-initialize CUDA in forked subprocess. To use CUDA with multiprocessing, you must use the spawn start method'. All 3 method aliases (qwen3_5_mtp / mtp / qwen3_next_mtp) hit the same crash because they all reach the same CUDA-init code path before any MTP-specific dispatch can run.
